_comment: Global config for the modular pixel-character factory. A 'skeleton' is a generation-parameter profile we A/B before committing to a winner. Per skeleton: make `characters_per_skeleton` UNDRESSED base characters, animate each, then create OUTFIT states (a 'dress' = one full clothing change, e.g. swim trunks -> godly armor) that regenerate the animations with that clothing. This matches PixelLab: a character has one base + multiple states; there is no per-slot gear layering.

budget._comment: Loop stops cleanly when the PixelLab balance drops below this.

base_outfit: wearing only plain underclothes (a plain sleeveless undershirt and simple shorts), barefoot, neutral undressed base body ready to be dressed

outfits._comment: Each outfit is a PixelLab character STATE ('wearing X'), stored on the character (visible in the UI, syncable). It regenerates the listed animations with that clothing. `animations` is kept small during skeleton exploration to bound cost; set it to the full animation list for a winning skeleton. By default outfits are only generated on the reference character (char_00).

list.description: a rugged brown leather adventurer tunic with a belt and boots
a deep blue wizard robe with a pointed hat
ornate glowing golden divine plate armor
a thick fur-lined winter coat with a hood

animations.action: standing still, idle breathing
walking
running fast
jumping straight up, arms raised
crouching down low, idle
falling downward through the air
kicking forward with one leg while standing
throwing a forward punch while standing
low sweeping kick while crouching
punching forward while crouching low
flying kick in mid air
punching forward while airborne
punching forward while running
kicking forward while running
landing softly from a short hop, slight knee bend
landing from a fall, knees bending to absorb impact
hard landing from a high fall, crouching low on impact
head snapping back, recoiling backward from a hit to the head
doubling over backward from a punch to the stomach
stumbling backward from a hit to the legs
lurching forward from a blow to the back of the head
pitching forward from a hit to the back
stumbling forward from a hit to the back of the legs
flinching while crouching, struck from the front
flinching forward while crouching, struck from behind

style_base: cozy farming-sim RPG pixel art, Grave Seasons / Stardew Valley inspired, warm earthy palette, clean readable shapes

skeleton_variations.note: Baseline: low top-down, 64x64, 4 cardinal directions (classic farming-sim movement).
Taller canvas for more detail, 4 directions.

procedural_variation._comment: When skeleton_variations is exhausted, derive further skeletons by cycling these axes.
